title: European markets to open higher as Trump considers Iran peace proposal
summary: European stocks are expected to open higher as investors process latest developments regarding potential Iran peace negotiations. The move reflects optimism about de-escalation in the region and upcoming corporate earnings reports.
content: European stocks are expected to open higher on Tuesday as investors assess the latest developments in the Iran war, and look ahead to earnings reports.

zh.title: 欧洲市场因特朗普考虑伊朗和平提议而高开
zh.summary: 欧洲股市预期高开，投资者正在处理有关潜在伊朗和平谈判的最新发展。此举反映了市场对地区局势缓和和即将到来的企业财报的乐观态度。

title: BP profits more than double as Iran war sends oil prices higher
summary: BP's profits more than doubled, driven by exceptional performance in its oil trading business amid elevated prices from Iran conflict. The results highlight how geopolitical tensions continue to support energy sector profitability.
content: The energy giant said it had seen an "exceptional" performance at its oil trading business.

zh.title: 伊朗战争推高油价，英国石油公司利润增长两倍多
zh.summary: 英国石油公司利润增长两倍多，这是由于伊朗冲突导致油价上升，其石油交易业务表现出色。这些结果突显了地缘政治紧张局势如何继续支持能源部门的盈利能力。

title: BP profits more than double, beating expectations as Iran war boosts oil prices
summary: BP's profits more than doubled and exceeded expectations, buoyed by higher oil prices stemming from Iran war tensions. The strong results come shortly after shareholders voted against the company's board at its annual meeting.
content: The results come shortly after BP's board suffered a shareholder revolt at its annual general meeting.

zh.title: 伊朗战争推高油价，英国石油公司利润增长两倍多超出预期
zh.summary: 英国石油公司利润增长两倍多并超出预期，受益于伊朗战争紧张局势导致的更高油价。这些强劲结果是在股东在年度会议上投票反对公司董事会不久后公布的。

title: Prada launches Indian-made sandals after cultural appropriation backlash
summary: Prada is launching sandals manufactured in India after facing backlash for previously showcasing similar designs without crediting their Indian cultural origins. The move represents the luxury brand's effort to address cultural appropriation concerns raised by critics.
content: Prada had faced backlash last year after it showcased similar designs at a fashion show without acknowledging their Indian roots.

zh.title: 普拉达在文化挪用反弹后推出印度制造凉鞋
zh.summary: 普拉达在因之前展示类似设计而未追溯其印度文化起源而遭到反弹后，推出了在印度制造的凉鞋。这一举措代表了这个奢侈品牌为解决评论家提出的文化挪用问题所做的努力。

title: Bank of Japan keeps policy rate steady while raising inflation forecast on Iran war worries
summary: Japan's central bank kept its policy rate unchanged in a 6-3 vote while raising its inflation forecast amid concerns about the Iran conflict's economic impact. The decision aligns with analyst consensus on holding rates steady for now.
content: The decision to keep rates steady came in a split 6-3 vote, and was in line with Reuters-polled analysts' estimates.

zh.title: 日本央行在伊朗战争担忧下保持政策利率不变同时上调通胀预测
zh.summary: 日本央行在6-3投票中保持政策利率不变，同时在对伊朗冲突经济影响的担忧中上调了通胀预测。该决定与分析师关于目前保持利率不变的共识一致。

title: Cost of living payment date brought forward
summary: The UK government has accelerated its cost of living payments to July, moving them forward from their traditional autumn timing. The earlier distribution is intended to provide quicker relief to households facing financial pressures.
content: The government said payments - normally made in autumn - will be given out in July.

zh.title: 生活成本补助支付日期提前
zh.summary: 英国政府已将生活成本补助提前至七月，从传统的秋季时间提前。更早的分配旨在为面临经济压力的家庭提供更快的救济。

title: 'My husband might give up work to care for our kids' - nursery bills in Wales highest in Britain
summary: Parents in Wales face the highest childcare costs in Britain, with nursery bills becoming a major financial concern ahead of upcoming elections. Many households report that soaring childcare expenses are pushing parents to consider leaving the workforce.
content: Parents in Wales say the cost of childcare is one of their biggest worries ahead of the election.

zh.title: "我丈夫可能放弃工作照顾孩子" - 威尔士托儿费用为英国最高
zh.summary: 威尔士的家长面临英国最高的托儿成本，在即将到来的选举前托儿费用成为主要财务关切。许多家庭报告，不断上升的托儿费用促使家长考虑离职。

title: Meta, Google, OpenAI among Big Tech firms seeing top staff leaving to launch AI startups
summary: Former executives from major tech companies including Meta, Google, and OpenAI have recently launched AI startups and are raising hundreds of millions in investor funding. The exodus reflects both the appeal of entrepreneurship and confidence in the AI sector's growth potential.
content: Former employees at AI giants are raising hundreds of millions of dollars from investors months on from launching.

zh.title: Meta、Google、OpenAI等科技巨头公司高管离职创办AI初创公司
zh.summary: 来自Meta、Google和OpenAI等主要科技公司的前高管最近创办了AI初创公司，并获得了数亿美元的投资融资。这种人才流失既反映了创业的吸引力，也体现了对AI行业增长潜力的信心。

title: Oil rises as traders weigh Iran’s Hormuz offer and Trump’s next move
summary: Oil prices rose as traders assessed signals from ongoing U.S.-Iran negotiations and speculated about President Trump's next diplomatic moves. Uncertainty about whether negotiations could lead to de-escalation kept markets volatile.
content: Oil prices edged higher as investors parsed fresh signals from U.S.-Iran negotiations, with uncertainty over a potential de-escalation keeping markets on edge.

zh.title: 油价上升，交易员权衡伊朗海峡提议和特朗普的下一步行动
zh.summary: 随着交易员评估美伊谈判的信号并推测特朗普总统的下一步外交举措，油价上升。关于谈判是否可能导致局势降温的不确定性使市场保持波动。

title: CATL plunges more than 8% as the Chinese battery maker unveils $5 billion share placement
summary: Chinese EV battery maker Contemporary Amperex Technology (CATL) saw its shares plummet 8.5% after announcing plans for a roughly $5 billion equity placement in Hong Kong. The dilution announcement triggered significant market selling pressure.
content: Shares of Contemporary Amperex Technology (CATL) declined 8.5% after the EV battery giant unveiled plans for a roughly $5 billion equity placement in Hong Kong.

zh.title: 宁德时代跌超8% 宣布50亿美元股票发行计划
zh.summary: 中国电动汽车电池制造商宁德时代在宣布计划在香港进行约50亿美元股权融资后,股价暴跌8.5%。股权稀释公告引发了重大的市场抛售压力。

title: BYD draws EU scrutiny over labor abuse allegations at Hungary factory
summary: Chinese automaker BYD came under investigation from European lawmakers following allegations of harsh working conditions at its Hungarian manufacturing facility. The scrutiny adds to mounting pressure on Chinese manufacturers operating in Europe.
content: BYD has come under scrutiny from European lawmakers after a watchdog report alleged harsh working conditions at its Hungary plant.

zh.title: 比亚迪因匈牙利工厂劳工虐待指控引发欧盟审查
zh.summary: 中国汽车制造商比亚迪因其匈牙利制造工厂恶劣工作条件的指控而受到欧洲立法者的调查。这一审查加剧了对在欧洲运营的中国制造商的压力。

title: California is one step closer to America’s first billionaire wealth tax — and the divide between red and blue state taxes is getting deeper
summary: California has advanced legislation toward becoming the first U.S. state to implement a billionaire wealth tax, marking a significant shift in how states approach income inequality. The proposal reflects a widening gap between tax policies in red and blue states.
content: This year is shaping up to be a milestone moment for state income taxes after last year’s massive changes to federal income taxes.

zh.title: 加州离美国首个亿万富翁财富税更近一步——红蓝州税收差异越来越大
zh.summary: 加州已推进立法成为美国第一个实施亿万富翁财富税的州,标志着各州应对收入不平等方式的重大转变。该提案反映了红州和蓝州税收政策之间越来越大的差距。

title: Congressional Republicans rally around Trump's White House ballroom project
summary: Senate Republicans have proposed legislation to authorize $400 million in federal funding for a new White House ballroom project. The proposal reflects continued support from GOP lawmakers for infrastructure initiatives related to Trump administration priorities.
content: A group of Senate Republicans is proposing a bill to authorize $400 million in federal funds for the construction of a White House ballroom.

zh.title: 国会共和党人聚集支持特朗普白宫舞厅项目
zh.summary: 参议院共和党人提出立法，授权为新白宫舞厅项目拨款4亿美元联邦资金。该提案反映了共和党立法者对与特朗普政府优先事项相关的基础设施举措的持续支持。

title: Bed Bath & Beyond is seeing new life, as rare sales growth lifts stock more than 25%
summary: Bed Bath & Beyond reported its first significant quarterly revenue growth in nearly five years, driving a 25% stock increase. However, shares remain substantially below their peak during the 2021 meme-stock rally, indicating continued recovery challenges.
content: Management highlights the “first quarter of significant revenue growth in 19 quarters.” But the stock is still well below its meme-stock-era highs.

zh.title: 床浴超越迎来新生，罕见销售增长推动股票上涨超过25%
zh.summary: 床浴超越报告了近五年来首次显著的季度收入增长，推动股票上升25%。然而，股票仍远低于2021年散户抱团炒作期间的峰值，反映出持续的复苏挑战。

title: Higher inflation is on the way. The Fed needs to make this clear before it raises rates.
summary: Market analysts argue the Federal Reserve should communicate potential inflation risks to investors before adjusting interest rates. Clear Fed guidance on rising inflation could help investors prepare portfolios and manage financial risk more effectively.
content: Fed’s communication should help investors manage risk — including the possibility that rates may rise.

zh.title: 高通胀即将到来，美联储需在加息前明确表态
zh.summary: 市场分析师主张美联储应该在调整利率前向投资者沟通潜在的通胀风险。美联储对上升通胀的明确指导可以帮助投资者更有效地调整投资组合和管理财务风险。

title: Asia-Pacific markets trade mixed as investors assess latest U.S.-Iran signals
summary: Asian stock markets showed mixed performance Tuesday as investors monitored ongoing U.S.-Iran diplomatic negotiations. Geopolitical developments continue to influence market sentiment across the region.
content: Asia-Pacific markets traded mixed Tuesday as investors weighed the latest updates over U.S.-Iran negotiations.

zh.title: 亚太市场在投资者评估最新美伊信号之际波澜不惊
zh.summary: 亚洲股市周二表现不一，投资者密切关注正在进行的美伊外交谈判。地缘政治发展继续影响该地区的市场情绪。

title: It’s China’s duty-free retail mecca and a tropical oasis, to boot. For Beijing that’s no longer enough.
summary: China has given the island province of Hainan new directives to expand its role as a duty-free retail hub and tropical destination. Beijing's new orders signal ambitions to boost tourism and commerce on the strategically important island.
content: The island province of Hainan has new marching orders.

zh.title: 这是中国免税零售的圣地，也是热带绿洲。对北京来说，这还不够。
zh.summary: 中国已向海南岛省份下达新指示，以扩大其免税零售枢纽和热带旅游目的地的角色。北京的新命令表明了提升这一战略重要岛屿的旅游和商业发展的野心。
